title: lemurangis humilis
intro: Lemurangis humilis is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, leading to overall health benefits. Lemurangis humilis can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, making it accessible for those seeking its medicinal benefits.
